title: After OpenAI's Chaos, Anthropic Has An Opportunity (And Its Own Untraditional Board)
author: Alex Kantrowitz
text:
After OpenAI's Chaos, Anthropic Has An Opportunity (And Its Own Untraditional Board)
A long-term benefit trust will eventually pick most of Anthropic's board members. Can we trust the structure?
Life got interesting for Anthropic two weeks ago when OpenAI nearly lit itself on fire. Anthropic had been operating comfortably in OpenAI’s shadow, collecting billions in investment from Amazon, Google, and others as it developed similar technology with an increased focus on safety. Then, as OpenAI’s chaos rolled on, companies that built entirely on GP…
